hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"AUDIT REMINDER: Soubor upraven. PŘED DOKONČENÍM MUSÍŠ: 1) Přečti soubor zpět a ověř správnost, 2) Spusť tsc --noEmit pro dotčené TS apps, 3) WebSearch 2026 docs pro každou použitou knihovnu/API, 4) Zkontroluj logiku a edge cases."}}'

hooks.prompt:
Review whether the assistant properly completed its coding work.

FIRST: Check if the assistant made any code changes (Edit/Write tool calls on source files like .ts, .tsx, .svelte, .astro, .js, .css). If the assistant ONLY answered questions, did research, or had a discussion WITHOUT modifying code files, respond {"ok": true}.

IF code WAS modified, verify ALL:
1) READBACK: Every modified file was Read back AFTER editing to verify changes
2) TSC: For TypeScript changes, tsc --noEmit was run with 0 errors (apps/api → pnpm exec tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit, packages/db → pnpm exec tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit)
3) WEBSEARCH: WebSearch was used for current 2026 documentation of libraries/APIs used in changes (Effect TS, Astro, Svelte, Cloudflare, etc.) — training data is 2 years old, current docs are mandatory
4) CODE QUALITY: No hardcoded values, no TODO/FIXME placeholders, no copy-paste leftovers, no missing error handling, no eslint-disable
5) EFFECT TS (if applicable): No async/await, no .pipe() method (standalone pipe()), Data.TaggedError for errors, Schema.Class for models, Effect.tryPromise at boundaries
6) SECURITY: No injection, no exposed secrets, input validation at boundaries

If ANY check was skipped, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Audit incomplete: [specific missing items]"}.
If all passed, respond {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER po kompakci: 1) Effect TS strict — no async/await, standalone pipe(), Data.TaggedError, Schema.Class 2) VŽDY WebSearch 2026 docs PŘED implementací 3) TSC check po editaci TS 4) Komunikuj ČESKY 5) Audituj každou změnu'
